summary: Completed frontend testing for dark mode theme, Google Translate integration, and hero logo aspect ratio fix. All 8 features verified successfully.

1_dark_mode_toggle_desktop.details: Dark mode toggle button with data-testid='dark-mode-toggle' appears in header. Shows Moon icon in light mode, Sun icon in dark mode. Located next to Globe icon for translation.

2_dark_mode_toggle_mobile.details: Dark mode toggle visible on mobile viewport (390x844). Toggle is positioned in mobile header next to account and cart icons.

3_dark_mode_click_changes_theme.details: Clicking dark mode toggle adds 'dark' class to document.documentElement and changes background colors from cream (#faf8f5) to dark slate (#0f1419)

4_dark_mode_localstorage_persistence.details: Dark mode preference persists in localStorage under key 'addrika_dark_mode'. After page reload, theme state is restored correctly.

5_hero_background_dark_mode.details: Hero section background changes from light cream gradient to dark slate gradient (linear-gradient rgb(15, 20, 25) 0%, rgb(26, 35, 50) 50%, rgb(15, 20, 25) 100%)

6_category_cards_dark_mode.details: Category cards change from white (rgb(255, 255, 255)) in light mode to dark (rgb(26, 35, 50)) in dark mode with subtle border adjustments.

7_header_scrolled_dark_mode.details: Header when scrolled shows dark background (rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.95)) with backdrop blur in dark mode vs white in light mode.

8_google_translate_element.details: Google Translate element (#google_translate_element) exists in header with Globe icon. Script loads from translate.google.com. Widget initialization depends on external Google script availability.

9_hero_logo_aspect_ratio.details: Hero logo has CSS aspect-ratio: 1.19 / 1 applied. Display dimensions verified: 680px x 571.42px (ratio 1.19). Natural image dimensions 2938x2463.

ThemeContext.jsx.line_15_26: Initializes theme from localStorage with fallback to system preference
ThemeContext.jsx.line_29_38: Applies 'dark' class to document and persists to localStorage
ThemeContext.jsx.line_41_54: Listens for system preference changes (prefers-color-scheme: dark)

Header.jsx.line_93_98: Header dark mode styling when scrolled
Header.jsx.line_143_144: Dark mode toggle in desktop nav
Header.jsx.line_208_209: Dark mode toggle in mobile header

Hero.jsx.line_13_20: Dynamic background gradient based on isDarkMode

CategoryGrid.jsx.line_19_24: Section background gradient for dark mode
CategoryGrid.jsx.line_72_74: Card background color changes based on isDarkMode

index.css.line_69_111: Dark mode CSS variables including brand colors, backgrounds, and text colors

critical_code_review_comments: Google Translate widget may take a few seconds to fully initialize as it depends on external script from translate.google.com
Two DarkModeToggle components exist in Header - one for desktop (hidden on mobile), one for mobile (hidden on desktop). This is intentional for responsive design.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dark mode feature is fully functional with localStorage persistence under key 'addrika_dark_mode'. System preference detection also works. Google Translate uses external script that may have slight loading delay. Hero logo aspect ratio is 1.19:1 as specified.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All new features working as expected
